summary: All 7 ACs verified by reading game.py directly. Intro with ASCII graphics precedes phases, all 7 phases present with zweck/kernfrage/prompt, summary lists all 7 phases by name, no real sdd commands or .features/ directories created, skip-intro mechanism functional via .sdd_game_seen marker, standard library only. Two minor findings: unused sys import and unconditional ANSI codes (mitigated by README documentation). No AC violations.

findings.description: import sys at line 7 is never used anywhere in the file.
findings.evidence: grep for sys usage returns no hits beyond the import line
findings.suggestion: Remove the unused import to keep the file clean.

findings.description: ANSI escape codes are always emitted without checking terminal capability. Works on Windows Terminal and Unix terminals but will show raw codes on classic cmd.exe.
findings.evidence: No os.environ.get('NO_COLOR') or isatty() guard; README.md:43 documents the cmd.exe limitation.
findings.suggestion: Already mitigated by README documentation. Optionally add NO_COLOR env-var support for robustness.

findings.description: AC-005 requires runtime testing on both Windows and Unix terminals. Static review confirms cross-platform patterns but cannot substitute for execution.
findings.evidence: os.name branch and shutil.get_terminal_size used correctly; runtime test not performed.
findings.suggestion: No action required for static review pass. Recommend manual smoke-test on both platforms before release.

requirements_checked.evidence: game.py:83-164 show_intro() called at game.py:288 before phase loop; CHAOS_ASCII printed at line 105, SDD_ASCII at line 128
requirements_checked.notes: Two ASCII graphics present before any phase content

requirements_checked.evidence: PHASES[0] at game.py:172-177 is '1 · Brief'; run_phase() renders zweck/kernfrage/prompt at game.py:221-233
requirements_checked.notes: Brief is first phase with full content

requirements_checked.evidence: show_summary() game.py:249 iterates PHASES list: [f' {GRÜN}✓{RESET} {p["name"]}' for p in PHASES]
No subprocess import; os.system only at game.py:29 for cls/clear; only file written is .sdd_game_seen at game.py:273
os.name branch at game.py:29; shutil.get_terminal_size at game.py:37; README.md:9,13-20 documents both platforms
requirements_checked.notes: Static review only; runtime verification not performed

requirements_checked.evidence: _intro_already_seen() at game.py:267-268 checks .sdd_game_seen; skip prompt at game.py:281-284; bypass at game.py:287-288
requirements_checked.notes: Skip option offered on second run

requirements_checked.evidence: Imports at game.py:6-9: os, sys, shutil, textwrap — all Python standard library

verified_clean.result: Standard library only: os, sys, shutil, textwrap

verified_clean.method: Searched full file for subprocess, os.system patterns, .features
verified_clean.result: Only os.system call is cls/clear at line 29; no .features/ creation
Exactly 7 entries: Brief, Design, Spec, Research, Plan, Implement, Review, Close
Iterates full PHASES list by name; all 7 listed

verified_clean.method: Read main() game.py:276-294 and helper functions game.py:264-273
verified_clean.result: Marker written after intro; skip prompt shown on re-run; bypass correctly wired
